findings.message: Verdict APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS; 3 blocking conditions (BLOCKING-01/02/03) unchecked, all sign-offs [PENDING], no resolution evidence. Manual architect verification needed.
findings.action: Address BLOCKING-01/02/03 (HLD diagram set, IdP/Redis HA-DR design, two-tier JWT parameterisation) and update the review, or schedule a follow-up review before the Design-Complete (Alpha) gate 2026-08-16

findings.message: 47 requirements defined; 19 not referenced by any ADR (covered via HLDR/TRAC). Examples: BR-001, BR-002, FR-001, FR-002, FR-003
findings.action: Review whether these requirements need architectural decisions documented as ADRs
